proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `egfr_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `kras_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison: mean(dependency_BRAF | braf_v600e=1) - mean(dependency_BRAF | braf_v600e=0).
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` averaged -0.805 in `braf_v600e=1` lines (n=5574) versus -0.250 in other lines; the mutant subgroup was markedly more dependent.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison: mean(dependency_EGFR | egfr_amplification=1) - mean(dependency_EGFR | egfr_amplification=0).
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_EGFR` averaged -0.601 in `egfr_amplification=1` lines (n=3880) versus -0.252 in other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison: mean(dependency_ERBB2 | erbb2_amplification=1) - mean(dependency_ERBB2 | erbb2_amplification=0).
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_ERBB2` averaged -0.686 in `erbb2_amplification=1` lines (n=4890) versus -0.253 in other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison: mean(dependency_KRAS | kras_mutation=1) - mean(dependency_KRAS | kras_mutation=0).
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KRAS` averaged -0.559 in `kras_mutation=1` lines (n=11842) versus -0.252 in other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `braf_v600e=1` lines, the subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` and `pten_loss=1` has especially negative `dependency_BRAF` scores compared with all other lines.

Among `egfr_amplification=1` lines, the subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` and `copy_number_8q24>=0.428` has especially negative `dependency_EGFR` scores compared with all other lines.
Among `erbb2_amplification=1` lines, breast-lineage lines with `ifn_gamma_signature>=0.519` have especially negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores compared with all other lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: `braf_v600e=1` plus high growth plus `pten_loss=1` had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.885 (n=171) versus -0.309 in all other lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: `egfr_amplification=1` plus high growth plus high `copy_number_8q24` had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.669 (n=276) versus -0.277 in all other lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: `erbb2_amplification=1`, `lineage=breast`, and high `ifn_gamma_signature` had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.760 (n=292) versus -0.293 in all other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pancreatic-lineage cell lines have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-pancreatic lines.
Colorectal-lineage cell lines have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than non-colorectal lines.
Cell lines with `smad4_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `smad4_loss=0`.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by lineage=pancreatic.
analyses.result_summary: Pancreatic lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.426 (n=5102) versus -0.313 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by lineage=colorectal.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.369 (n=5816) versus -0.319 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by smad4_loss.
analyses.result_summary: `smad4_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.347 (n=6749) versus -0.321 in `smad4_loss=0` lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss=0`.
The subgroup with `nf1_loss=1`, `lineage=brain`, and `cdkn2a_loss=0` has especially negative `dependency_RIT1` scores compared with all other lines.
The subgroup with `nf1_loss=1`, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm<=4.230`, and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` has especially negative `dependency_RIT1` scores compared with all other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by nf1_loss.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.353 (n=4560) versus -0.257 in `nf1_loss=0` lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1`, `lineage=brain`, and `cdkn2a_loss=0` had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.432 (n=256) versus -0.265 in all other lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss=1`, low `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`, and high growth had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.427 (n=261) versus -0.265 in all other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Colorectal-lineage cell lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal lines.
Cell lines with `apc_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `apc_mutation=0`.
Cell lines with `wnt_activity_score>=0.819` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with lower `wnt_activity_score`.
The complete subgroup `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and `wnt_activity_score>=0.819` has much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by lineage=colorectal.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.720 (n=5816) versus -0.252 in other lineages.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by apc_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: `apc_mutation=1` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.545 (n=9285) versus -0.253 in `apc_mutation=0` lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison for high WNT quartile.
analyses.result_summary: High-WNT lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.469 (n=12508) versus -0.253 in lower-WNT lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and high `wnt_activity_score` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.112 (n=3133) versus -0.253 in all other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than slower-growing lines.
The subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm<=1.956`, and `nf1_loss=1` has more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other lines.
Luminal-subtype cell lines have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than non-luminal lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison for high growth quartile.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.282 (n=12577) versus -0.245 in slower-growing lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_TMED10.
analyses.result_summary: High growth, low `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm`, and `nf1_loss=1` had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.356 (n=307) versus -0.253 in all other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by lineage_subtype=luminal.
analyses.result_summary: Luminal-subtype lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.265 (n=3898) versus -0.253 in other lines; the effect was small but nominally significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than slower-growing lines.
Cell lines with `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than lines with lower `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`.
The subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669`, and `lineage=prostate` has especially negative `dependency_DHX9` scores compared with all other lines.
Cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than slower-growing lines.

The subgroup with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, `lineage_subtype=adenocarcinoma`, and `rnaseq_SLFN11_log2_tpm>=4.439` has especially negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores compared with all other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison for high growth quartile.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.361 (n=12577) versus -0.324 in slower-growing lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison for high MYC-expression quartile.
analyses.result_summary: High `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.355 (n=12501) versus -0.327 in lower-MYC lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: High growth, high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`, and `lineage=prostate` had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.456 (n=169) versus -0.333 in all other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison for high growth quartile.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.497 (n=12577) versus -0.393 in slower-growing lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_POLR2A.
analyses.result_summary: High growth, adenocarcinoma subtype, and high `rnaseq_SLFN11_log2_tpm` had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.545 (n=359) versus -0.418 in all other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `myc_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `copy_number_8q24>=0.428` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than lines with lower `copy_number_8q24`.
The subgroup with `myc_amplification=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, and `lineage=pancreatic` has especially negative `dependency_RPL11` scores compared with all other lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison by myc_amplification.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.361 (n=8055) versus -0.252 in non-amplified lines.

analyses.code: Welch two-sample comparison for high copy_number_8q24 quartile.
analyses.result_summary: High `copy_number_8q24` lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.344 (n=12501) versus -0.245 in lower-8q24 lines.

analyses.code: Systematic triple-predicate subgroup comparison for dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification=1`, high growth, and `lineage=pancreatic` had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.438 (n=268) versus -0.269 in all other lines.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `braf_v600e=1` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `egfr_amplification=1` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `erbb2_amplification=1` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `kras_mutation=1` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `nf1_loss=1` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `lineage=colorectal` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores.
In the systematic single-predicate heterogeneity screen, `myc_amplification=1` is the strongest single subgroup for more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_BRAF` was `braf_v600e=1` with effect -0.555.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_EGFR` was `egfr_amplification=1` with effect -0.349.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_ERBB2` was `erbb2_amplification=1` with effect -0.432.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_KRAS.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_KRAS` was `kras_mutation=1` with effect -0.307.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_RIT1` was `nf1_loss=1` with effect -0.096.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_KIF18A` was `lineage=colorectal` with effect -0.468.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_TMED10.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_TMED10` was high growth with effect -0.037.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_DHX9` was high growth with effect -0.037.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_POLR2A.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_POLR2A` was high growth with effect -0.104.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over binary features, categorical levels, and continuous Q25/Q75 predicates for dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: The most negative single subgroup for `dependency_RPL11` was `myc_amplification=1` with effect -0.109.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_BRAF` is `braf_v600e=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, and `pten_loss=1`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.

The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_EGFR` is `egfr_amplification=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, and `copy_number_8q24>=0.428`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.
The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_ERBB2` is `erbb2_amplification=1`, `lineage=breast`, and `ifn_gamma_signature>=0.519`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.
The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_KRAS` is `kras_mutation=1`, `nf1_loss=0`, and `erbb2_amplification=0`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.
The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_RIT1` is `nf1_loss=1`, `lineage=brain`, and `cdkn2a_loss=0`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.
The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_KIF18A` is `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, and `wnt_activity_score>=0.819`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.

The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_TMED10` is `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, `rnaseq_ASCL2_log2_tpm<=1.956`, and `nf1_loss=1`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.

The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_DHX9` is `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669`, and `lineage=prostate`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.

The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_POLR2A` is `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, `lineage_subtype=adenocarcinoma`, and `rnaseq_SLFN11_log2_tpm>=4.439`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.

The best-supported multi-feature subgroup for `dependency_RPL11` is `myc_amplification=1`, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964`, and `lineage=pancreatic`, with more negative dependency than all other lines.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_BRAF.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.885 in the `braf_v600e=1`, high-growth, `pten_loss=1` subgroup versus -0.309 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_EGFR.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.669 in the `egfr_amplification=1`, high-growth, high-8q24 subgroup versus -0.277 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_ERBB2.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.760 in the ERBB2-amplified, breast, IFN-high subgroup versus -0.293 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_KRAS.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.561 in the `kras_mutation=1`, `nf1_loss=0`, `erbb2_amplification=0` subgroup versus -0.267 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_RIT1.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.432 in the `nf1_loss=1`, brain-lineage, `cdkn2a_loss=0` subgroup versus -0.265 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_KIF18A.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -1.112 in the colorectal, APC-mutant, WNT-high subgroup versus -0.253 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_TMED10.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.356 in the high-growth, low-ASCL2, `nf1_loss=1` subgroup versus -0.253 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_DHX9.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.456 in the high-growth, high-MYC-expression, prostate-lineage subgroup versus -0.333 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_POLR2A.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.545 in the high-growth, adenocarcinoma, SLFN11-high subgroup versus -0.418 outside.

analyses.code: Systematic pair/triple predicate screen for dependency_RPL11.
analyses.result_summary: Mean -0.438 in the MYC-amplified, high-growth, pancreatic-lineage subgroup versus -0.269 outside.
